2:59 AM. You said:

My order arrived and one item is damaged — what do I do?

02:59 AM
Almost there

turns.q: Is a damaged item handled differently from a normal return?
turns.replyTail:
livery. Items must be in their original packaging, with labels and accessories, in perfect resellable condition, and must not have been washed, damaged, or altered. For non-bulky items from mainland France, returns are free through the return portal: https://app.fastoche.co/app?shop=madura&view=home. For bulky items, and for returns from outside mainland France, return shipping is at your expense. Once the return arrives and is validated, the refund is processed within 14 working days.

03:00 AM

turns.q: Do you need photos, and where do I send them?
turns.replyTail:
ease send clear photos of the damaged or defective item, and photos of any damaged components if applicable, together with your order number here in the chat after logging in. If you are requesting a return, please note that returns are accepted within 14 days of receipt, items must be in their original packaging with labels and accessories, in perfect resellable condition, and refunds are processed within 14 working days after the return is received and validated.

03:01 AM
Verify order details

turns.q: Will I get a replacement or a refund?
turns.replyTail:
f the damaged issue (and any damaged components if applicable). For returns in general, the return request must be within 14 days of receipt, items must be returned in their original packaging with the label and accessories and in perfect resellable condition, and they must not have been washed, damaged, or altered. After a return arrives and is validated, the refund is processed within 14 working days.

Please leave your email address so the team can reach you.
